---
name: Integrity review
about: Review an economic or compute-routing change for safety and auditability.
title: "[integrity] "
labels: integrity-review
assignees: ""
---

## Change

Describe the proposed decision, module, or integration.

## Value Produced

Who benefits, what output is produced, and how quality is checked.

## Cost Boundary

Local cost, remote cost, storage cost, bandwidth cost, and verification cost.

## Privacy Boundary

Data that remains local, data that may leave the machine, and data that must be
sanitized.

## Integrity Gate

Truthfulness, user autonomy, memory integrity, legality, safety, and audit
checks.

## Approval Needed

List any real spending, public deployment, external data sharing, private-memory
export, chain write, or irreversible action.
